sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9792" key="a)ntiba/kxeios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντι-βάκχειος</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πούς</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, the foot - - ̆, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4175.tlg002:1:513" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diom.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.513</biblScope> </bibl> K., al.: —also <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντί-βακχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ter.Maur.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1411</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
